column1:
2024 Security Awareness Training
Series - Passwords and
Authentication
column2:
The Course is designed to focus on Data Privacy, Protection and Incident Reporting to reduce
privacy breaches by UBA employees. The aim is to teach employees how to identify and avoid
potential risks to sensitive data.
